projectDescription: Smart expense splitting app for groups with real-time balances, group management, and visual settlement suggestions.
keyFeatures: Group management for different expense sharing scenarios
Flexible expense tracking with multiple split types (equal, percentage, exact amounts)
Smart settlement calculations using minimal transaction algorithm
Group invitation system with expiring tokens
Real-time balance tracking across all group members
Export capabilities for group data and settlements
publicApiSurface: group.create - Create a new expense group
group.getAll - Get all groups for the current user
group.getById - Get a specific group by ID
group.addPerson - Add a person to a group
group.deletePerson - Remove a person from a group
group.leaveGroup - Leave a group as a member
group.removeMember - Remove a member from a group (owner only)
expense.getBalances - Get current balances for a group
settlement.getByGroupId - Get settlements for a group
settlement.markAsSettled - Mark a settlement as paid
settlement.markAllAsSettled - Mark all settlements as paid
invite.getByGroupId - Get invites for a group
